description: Skilled medics can learn advanced techniques that improve their ability to treat injuries and ailments. Medical Secrets represent a deep understanding of medicine and anatomy, and are usually available only to experienced healers such as those who have trained in the Medic Prestige Class.
notes: Whenever you gain access to a new Medical Secret, select it from the list below. Once selected, a Medical Secret cannot be changed, and you cannot select the same Medical Secret more than once.

secrets.name: Improved First Aid
secrets.description: When you use a Medpac to perform First Aid with the Treat Injury skill, the creature gains one additional point for every point by which your check exceeds the DC (in addition to any extra Hit Point gained normally for exceeding the DC).

secrets.name: Improved Heal Damage
secrets.description: On a successful Surgery attempt to Heal Damage, the target recovers an additional number of Hit Points equal to your Class Level.

secrets.name: Improved Long-Term Care
secrets.description: On a successful application of Long-Term Care, the target recovers an additional number of Hit Points equal to your Class Level.

secrets.name: Improved Perform Surgery
secrets.description: You can attempt a Treat Injury check to perform Surgery in half the usual time.

secrets.name: Improved Revivify
secrets.description: You can make a Treat Injury check to Revivify someone as a Standard Action instead of a Full-Round Action.

secrets.name: Improved Treatment
secrets.description: You can make a Treat Injury check to treat Disease or Radiation in 1 hour, instead of 8 hours. Also, you can treat up to twice as many patients as normal.

secrets.name: Personal Physician
secrets.description: You take no penalties on your Skill Checks when using the Treat Injury skill on yourself.

secrets.name: Arkanian Cloning Secrets
secrets.description: You are capable of using the Gene Splicing Talent to create new near-Species or new creatures without adding +10 to the DC of the check for each additional Species you splice (though you still pay for added traits, forms of movement, and natural attacks).

secrets.name: Columi/Khommite Cloning Secrets
secrets.description: Clones you create gain a +5 bonus to their Will Defense when they roll to check for Clone Madness.

secrets.name: Kaminoan Cloning Secrets
secrets.description: When you roll a Knowledge (Life Sciences) check to create a clone, you may Take 10 or Take 20 on the check.

secrets.name: Lurrian Cloning Secrets
secrets.description: When you use a Gene Sequencer, you gain an additional +5 bonus to your Knowledge (Life Sciences) check when you create a clone.

secrets.name: Medical Cloning Secrets
secrets.description: You are able to use cloning to create replacement organs with no chance of rejection, as well as gene-therapy to help revitalize your patients. You can create a retrovirus that reduces the physical age of your patient by 1 step (from Middle Age to Adult, etc). Note you cannot use this to move younger than Young Adult. A de-aging retrovirus adds +10 to the DC.

secrets.name: Polis Massan Cloning Secrets
secrets.description: When you make a Knowledge (Life Sciences) check to create a clone with a Fossilized or Dead DNA tissue sample, the DC is reduced by 5.

secrets.name: Verpine Cloning Secrets
secrets.description: When you make a Knowledge (Life Sciences) check to create multiple clones with the Mass Cloning Talent, reduce your DC by 5.
